calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542.

Paul Hograth, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Valerie Simpson, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Gary Bozman.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 18, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Gary Bozman as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 440 Eddy Street, #117, San Francisco, CA. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of DEC-06-2010 remains on calendar.
